message:
fix(gateway/context): fix tokenizer separator counting and partial strategy handling

- Account for separator tokens ("\n\n" and " ") when accumulating chunks
- Add edge case handling for zero/negative maxTokens in truncation
- Handle case where ellipsis tokens exceed maxTokens budget
- Handle sentences that exceed maxTokensPerChunk by truncating them
- Use createStrategy() to merge partial strategies with defaults, preventing
  crashes when users provide incomplete strategy objects

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
